chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-631 of 2022 (Allah Bux @ Bakhshu Vs. The State 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Bail Application 06-03-2023. Mr. Abdul Majeed, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< Irshad Ali Shah, J. It is alleged that on arrest from the applicant was secured 1050 grams of Charas by police party of Police Station, Ubauro for that he was booked and reported upon. On having been refused bail by learned Incharge Additional Sessions Judge Ubauro, the applicant has sought for the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s 497, Cr.P.C. 2. Heard arguments and perused the record. 3. There is no independent witness to the incident. Only one piece of charas weighing to be 100 grams has been subjected to Chemical examination that too with delay of 03 days to its recovery; therefore the liability of the applicant, if any would be only to the extent of 100 grams of charas. The case has finally been challaned. There is no apprehension of tampering with the evidence on the part of applicant, who is said to be in custody since 05 months, without effective progress in trial of his case. In these circumstances the case for the release of applicant on bail on point of further enquiry is made out. 4. In view of above, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. 5. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nasim/P.A.
